_comment: MCP Client Configuration Template — Browser Automation Stack
_warning: DO NOT store this file with real tokens. Use PLACEHOLDERS only.
_usage: Copy to your MCP client config location. Replace <PLACEHOLDER> values with real tokens generated in the respective service UI.
_security: Never commit real tokens. This file uses safe placeholders.
